title: higginsia refulgens var. smaragdina
intro: Higginsia refulgens var. smaragdina, also known as the Smaragdina or Emerald Leaf, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is a plant used in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Higginsia refulgens var. smaragdina include its ability to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Higginsia refulgens var. smaragdina is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and can be used externally as a topical application for skin conditions.
